author: IGN YouTube
text:
Virtua Fighter Crossroads: Bakunawa Killer Announcement Trailer
A city you've never seen. A story you've never heard. A totally new Virtua Fighter.

Experience a rich, cinematic single-player adventure with immersive narrative-driven gameplay, and the series’ trademark thrilling VS battles!

This isn’t a remake. This isn't a trip down memory lane.

This is the next evolution of VIRTUA FIGHTER.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Invincible VS - Official Season One Launch Trailer
Take a look at the Season One launch trailer for Invincible VS, the hit fighting game based on the comic and Prime Video series developed by Quarter Up. Fight with Universa & The Immortal while flexing new premium and earnable skins. Play Endless Arcade mode, plus much more. The Immortal & Universa join Invincible VS on June 30 as the first two fighters of the Year 1 Character Pass.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Everything We've Learned About Resident Evil Veronica
We think Resident Evil: Code Veronica is the game in the series that perhaps needs revisiting the most, and after we finally got to see our first glimpse of the remake, Resident Evil Veronica, we spoke to the producer, who answered some of our lingering questions.
We discuss in detail what the game's producer shared with us, such as Resident Evil Veronica will be exclusively in third-person, and some of the alterations they're planning to make to the story and characters. 

#summerofgaming #ign

author: IGN YouTube
text:
BlazBlue: CentralFiction - Official Trinity Glassfille Character Reveal Trailer
Watch the latest BlazBlue: CentralFiction trailer for the announcement of Trinity Glassfille, a key character who has appeared since the early stages of the "BLAZBLUE" story, who will finally be joining the roster as a playable character. The illustration was drawn by the series' creator, Toshimichi Mori. Stay tuned for further updates regarding the update timing and details! BlazBlue: CentralFiction is available now on PC (Steam), PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Nintendo Switch.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Pokemon Expert Answers Your Novice, Enthusiast, and Expert Questions
Watch a Pokemon expert answer and react to your Reddit questions! How would you explain Pokemon lore to someone who knows almost nothing about it? Well, we got Lore Keeper Toby, a Pokemon master, to answer a mix of novice, enthusiast, and expert questions from the anime, to the numerous generations of Pokemon games, and more!

So, what are Pokemon actually? If you're new to Pokemon, what and where do I start? Which Pokemon generation is the most important, and... Why do people sexualise Pokemon? We have that, and more, answered by Toby, our Pokémon expert!

Lore Keeper Toby is a Pokemon content creator, with a focus on introducing Pokemon lore to newcomers and veterans alike, covering topics such as 'Rating Your Pokemon Hot Takes', 'I know which Pokemon Destroyed Pokopia', and more!

You can watch Toby's videos here: https://www.youtube.com/@LoreKeeperToby/videos

So, what are some of your favourite bits of Pokemon lore and theories? Enjoy the occasional pokemon iceberg? Or are you just a Pokemon beginner taking their first steps into the anime, manga, games, TCG and more? Let us know!

00:00 Intro
00:31 So what actually are Pokemon exactly?
01:04 I am new to Pokemon, what and where do I start?
01:58 What are good Pokemon to start with for new players?
03:00 Can Pokemon talk? How can you communicate with them?
04:26 How should you pronounce Arceus?
05:05 Are Pokemon sentient in the same way as humans? If so, does this apply to all Pokemon?
07:47 Which generation made the most important additions to Pokemon?
09:39 Why does Farfetch'd (amazing name btw) wield a leek?
10:33 Why does the number of legs matter?
12:21 Why does Psychic beat Poison???
13:38 How does "Swagger" work?
14:30 Can anyone explain what the appeal of Pokemon Home/Bank is?
15:51 Why does the Diamond Clan and The Pearl Clan call Pokemon, Pokemon?
17:45 Why does Pokerus make Pokemon stronger instead of sicker?
19:58 What type specialist do you think don't fit their types and if so, what type would you change their speciality to?
21:17 Is it normal for the community to sexualize Pokemon?
21:50 How does Zubat carry Squirtle here?
22:58 What are some different ways I can improve my Pokemon knowledge?


#pokemon #pokemonlore #pokemonexplained

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Guilty Gear Strive - Official Robo-Ky Character Reveal Trailer
Check out the play style of the second character in Season Pass 5, Robo-Ky, in this trailer for Guilty Gear Strive, an action fighting game developed by Arc System Works. Players can soon gain access to a new playable character with the Season Pass 5 as Robo-Ky takes to the fight. Robo-Ky is scheduled to be released on July 2, 2026, with Season Pass 5 of Guilty Gear Strive on PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
DarkSwarm - Official Gameplay Trailer
Get a look at action-packed gameplay from DarkSwarm in this trailer for the upcoming online co-op, top-down tactical shooter game. Play as a team of elite operators in procedurally generated, semi-destructible levels. Use your skills, wits, and teamwork to destroy the alien DarkSwarm in daring operations deep inside the infested colonies. DarkSwarm will be available in Steam Early Access.

#IGN #Gaming
